name: PR fetcher emits one JSON record per fetched PR with number, merged-at, author, and review-comment count
command: mkdir -p fixtures && printf '{"number":42,"merged":true,"merged_at":"2026-05-12T00:00:00Z","author":"alice","review_comments":3}\n' > fixtures/prs.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetch.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub fixtures/prs.jsonl --out out.jsonl --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"number":42' out.jsonl && grep -q '"author":"alice"' out.jsonl && grep -q '"review_comments":3' out.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
